headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Turns Negative As Nasdaq Slides; Palantir Retreats (Live Coverage)

The Dow weakened in the final hour of trading Tuesday and finished the session with a 0.2% loss, after back-and-forth moves throughout the session.

headline: Was Michael Burry Right About AI Stocks for the Wrong Reason?
summary: Last November, Michael Burry published a pointed critique arguing that major AI players were artificially inflating profits by stretching depreciation schedules on GPUs and servers far beyond their real-world usefulness. In his view, hyperscalers are treating cutting-edge chips — designed by Nvidia for 12- to 18-month obsolescence cycles — as if they would last four ... headline: Britain's FCA defends Palantir contract award before lawmakers
summary: U.S. data analytics firm Palantir, which won a contract to supply AI systems to Britain's Financial Conduct Authority, will not have access to regulatory intelligence, an ‌FCA official said on Tuesday, as the deal came under criticism from lawmakers.  Palantir Technologies, co-founded by ‌Peter Thiel - a billionaire venture capitalist and early supporter of President Donald Trump - won a 12-week contract to analyse the FCA's ​internal data to help combat financial crime.

raw.headline: Britain's FCA defends Palantir contract award before lawmakers
raw.summary: U.S. data analytics firm Palantir, which won a contract to supply AI systems to Britain's Financial Conduct Authority, will not have access to regulatory intelligence, an ‌FCA official said on Tuesday, as the deal came under criticism from lawmakers. headline: Palantir Stock Surges as AI Demand Accelerates Growth
summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) ranks among the best high profit margin stocks to buy. On March 11, Truist Securities reiterated its Buy rating on Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) and set a price target of $223. Analyst Arvind Ramnani visited Palantir’s premises, where he spoke with the company’s CFO, Chief Architect, and Head of Investor Relations, […]

headline: Striveworks Secures Growth Capital to Expand AI Operations Work in U.S. and Allied Defense Communities
summary: Striveworks, a leader in AI operations for defense and national security missions, today announced a strategic growth investment led by Washington Harbour Partners. Striveworks is a proven U.S. government partner whose platform is deployed across numerous agencies and divisions—including the Army's $100 million flagship AI initiative alongside Anduril, Palantir, and Microsoft. The capital will allow the company to enhance its product offerings, grow its engineering and R&D teams, and scale to me

headline: OKX Rolls Out Round the Clock Trading for Mag Seven Stocks Using Crypto Collateral
summary: The derivatives give users synthetic exposure to major U.S. equities while using Bitcoin and other crypto holdings as collateral, with plans to expand into tokenized assets later this year.
